description.value:
These implanted devices duplicate the effects of sensor systems that go beyond normal human senses. In all cases, their use requires concentration and a Half Action. Common systems function identically to a standard hand-held auspex device.

Poor systems possess only a single detection ability with a limited range of 20 metres. Good systems function as a full auspex, but also allow the character to re-roll all Perception-based tests.
description.summary: An augur array duplicates sensor systems beyond normal human senses and requires concentration and a Half Action to use.

system.effect: An augur array duplicates sensor systems beyond normal human senses and requires concentration and a Half Action to use.
